home.site_desc: Official website of Zen Eyer, also known as DJ Zen Eyer, Brazilian Zouk DJ and music producer
home.page_title: Zen Eyer | Brazilian Zouk DJ & Music Producer
home.page_meta_desc: Zen Eyer, Brazilian Zouk DJ and music producer, winner of Best DJ Performance and Best Remix at the 2022 Brazilian Zouk DJ World Championship. Book for international events.
home.headline: Experience the <1>Zen</1> in Brazilian Zouk
home.subheadline: Transforming dance floors into immersive audio experiences
home.features_subtitle: Unlock exclusive benefits and be part of an engaged community
home.feat_exclusive_desc: Early access to releases and exclusive remixes
home.feat_achievements_desc: Earn XP, unlock badges, and level up
home.feat_community_desc: Connect with music lovers and Zen Eyer
home.cta_title: Ready to Join the Zen Tribe?
home.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of members and transform your experience
home.hero_badge: Best DJ Performance + Best Remix - 2022 Brazilian Zouk DJ World Championship
home.pronunciation_summary: (Phonetic: /zɛn ˈaɪər/. Eyer sounds like Buyer without the B, or like 'Eye' followed by 'er').
home.hero_slogan: Haste is the enemy of creaminess
home.hero_cta_text: Full sets and remixes. For more streaming and download options, go to <0>Music</0>.
home.bio_p1: is a Brazilian DJ and producer focused on Brazilian Zouk. In 2022, I had the honor of winning Best Remix and Best DJ Performance at the Brazilian Zouk DJ World Championship, consolidating a journey that started early on the dance floor and now takes me to play in 14 countries.
home.bio_p2: Known for a sound focused on the pure 'flow' of the dance — a vibe our community affectionately calls 'cremosidade' —, I prioritize sets where the energy builds gradually, giving the dancer time and space to connect without rush.
home.bio_p3: Whether at reZENha, at Renata Peçanha's Rio Zouk Congress (where I have the honor of playing annually), or at festivals around the world, the mission is always the same: to create the perfect atmosphere for those who love Brazilian Zouk.
home.festivals_subtitle: Recognized at major Zouk events worldwide
home.press_desc: Complete press kit, high-resolution photos, releases, and interviews available.
home.booking_desc: Available for congresses, festivals, workshops, and exclusive events in Brazil and abroad.

tribe.title: Join the <1>Zen Tribe</1>
tribe.subtitle: No rush here. Just prolonged melting.
tribe.desc: Access exclusive content, behind-the-scenes, and be part of the official DJ Zen Eyer community.

home.bio_intro: DJ Zen Eyer (Marcelo Eyer Fernandes) is a Brazilian Zouk DJ and music producer. In 2022, he won the Best Remix and Best DJ Performance awards at the Brazilian Zouk DJ World Championship, recognized for his technical precision and musical sensitivity.
home.bio_style: Known for his "creamy" and engaging style, Zen prioritizes connection. No rush. His signature drop "Zen? Zen? Zen? Eyer? Eyer?" is already a classic at festivals.
home.bio_mensa: Member of Mensa International, he creates perfect emotional journeys for the "flow" in dance. He is a regular at major stages like Rio Zouk Congress.

tribe_page_meta_desc: Zen Tribe is a Brazilian Zouk movement for dancers who choose presence over performance, connection over applause, and feeling over content.

philosophy.coming_soon_desc: Complete artistic manifesto of {{name}} is being updated for the 2026 world tour.
philosophy.cremosidade_desc: More than a sound, it's a texture. It's the feeling of melting into the movement, where every transition is smooth and every beat is a soft invitation to feel more.

philosophy_page.hero_subtitle: The philosophy behind every beat, every transition, every moment on the dance floor.
philosophy_page.style_desc: The unmistakable sonic signature — deep bass, smooth transitions and an energy that transforms any dance floor into an experience.
philosophy_page.connection_desc: Music as a bridge between two souls, creating a moment of absolute presence.
philosophy_page.flow_desc: Continuous movement where time stops and only the beat and breath matter.
philosophy_page.cremosidade_desc: More than a sound, it's a texture. It's the feeling of melting into the movement, where every transition is smooth and every beat is a soft invitation to feel more.
philosophy_page.the_source_desc: Everything starts from a deep respect for the roots. We take the essence of the past and remix it for the souls of today.
philosophy_page.coming_soon_desc: The complete artistic manifesto is being prepared for the 2026 World Tour. Stay tuned for the full descent into the Zen Universe.

bio.title: The Sonic Journey
bio.p1: Zen Eyer is a Brazilian Zouk DJ and music producer focused on festivals, marathons, and dance floors that need emotional range, musical control, and trust.
bio.p2: He has performed in 14 countries and won Best DJ Performance and Best Remix at the 2022 Brazilian Zouk DJ World Championship, bringing a creamy, emotional sound that gives dancers time to breathe, connect, and stay on the floor.
bio.p3: His sets are built for organizers who need a DJ able to read mixed-level crowds, hold the room with confidence, and turn a program slot into a remembered dance-floor experience.

canonical_bio.whatsapp_default_msg: Hello Zen Eyer! I'd like to talk about booking.
canonical_bio.text: Zen Eyer is a Brazilian Zouk DJ and music producer from Niterói, Brazil. Also known as DJ Zen Eyer, he won Best Remix and Best DJ Performance at the 2022 Brazilian Zouk DJ World Championship. He has performed in 14 countries in person and is known for creamy, emotional sets designed for Brazilian Zouk festivals, marathons, and social dance floors.

header.title: Support DJ <1>Zen Eyer</1>
header.description_p1: If you're the kind of person who believes dancing can be more than steps — if you want more connection, human music, and real presence — supporting my work costs less than a water bottle at a zouk party.
header.description_p2: For you, it's almost nothing. For me, it makes a big difference at the end of the month.
header.description_p3: Consider contributing and helping this project keep existing, with new music, sets, and experiences made for those who don't want to stay on the surface.

support.thankYou: Thank you so much for the support. This is what helps me keep producing new music and bringing Brazilian Zouk cremosidade around the world. 🙏

events_no_results_filter: Sorry, I couldn't find any events in this state. Maybe check the full schedule?

lambadeiro.title: The Lambadeiro 🌪️
lambadeiro.subtitle: Speed, Whips & Hair Flips
lambadeiro.description: You don't just dance, you spin. The faster the beat, the happier you are. Your neck movements are legendary, and you treat every song like it's 180 BPM. You honor the roots of Zouk.
lambadeiro.shareText: I'm the Lambadeiro! 🌪️ Fast beats and hair flips. Which Zouk persona are you?

cremoso.title: The Creamy One 🍦
cremoso.subtitle: Smooth, Slow & Connected
cremoso.description: You are the definition of 'Gostosinho'. You prefer slow jams, R&B, and close embrace. For you, Zouk is about connection and flow. If there's space between you and your partner, you're doing it wrong.
cremoso.shareText: I'm The Creamy One! 🍦 Smooth and connected. Which Zouk persona are you?

tecnico.title: The Technician 📐
tecnico.subtitle: Precision, Angles & Drills
tecnico.description: You know the difference between a cambre and a torsion. You probably judge people's frame silently. Your dance is clean, precise, and visually perfect, likely because you've taken 500 privates.
tecnico.shareText: I'm The Technician! 📐 Perfect frame and precision. Which Zouk persona are you?

fritador.title: The Headbanger 🤘
fritador.subtitle: Beats, Trance & Energy
fritador.description: Give you a dark room and a heavy beat, and you're in heaven. You love Neozouk, complex rhythms, and energetic movements. You're probably sweating by the second song.
fritador.shareText: I'm The Headbanger! 🤘 Dark rooms and heavy beats. Which Zouk persona are you?

rolezeiro.title: The Socializer 🥂
rolezeiro.subtitle: Talks more than dances
rolezeiro.description: You're at the party for the vibes. You dance 3 songs and spend 2 hours talking by the bar. You know everyone's name and all the gossip. The party doesn't start until you arrive.
rolezeiro.shareText: I'm The Socializer! 🥂 Here for the gossip and vibes. Which Zouk persona are you?

q1.text: The DJ drops a super slow R&B remix. What do you do?

options.o1: Close my eyes and embrace the 'cremosidade'.
options.o2: Use it to practice my slow-motion head movements.
options.o3: Go to the bar to get a drink.

q2.text: What is your favorite accessory for a dance party?

options.o3: A breath mint and nice perfume.

q3.text: Someone asks you for a dance. What are you thinking?

options.o1: Do they know how to lead/follow a tilter?
options.o2: I hope they like fast spins!
options.o3: Let's see if we have connection.
options.o4: Sure, but I need to finish this conversation first.

q4.text: What is your Zouk pet peeve?

options.o1: People who don't protect the head.
options.o4: When the party ends too early.

q5.text: Ideally, how does a dance end?

options.o1: With a perfect dip and clean exit.
options.o4: With a high-five and a 'let's get water'.
